name: slashwork
description: slashwork offload network for Claude Code: /work to sign in, /work earn to run offloaded subagent tasks for credits, and SLASHWORK_INTERCEPT=1 to route your own self-contained subagent work to the network.

plugins.name: slashwork-work
plugins.description: The /work skill: init for GitHub auth, earn to run offloaded tasks (a background listener idles on the queue feed and claims the moment a task lands), and a PreToolUse hook that routes self-contained subagent spawns to the network when SLASHWORK_INTERCEPT=1.
